title: Build RoadTranslate translation API
description: Create RoadTranslate: AI translation API, 100+ languages, context-aware. Google Translate API alternative. /bin/zsh.01/1K chars. Beautiful landing page.
result: ✅ RoadTranslate BUILT! AI-powered translation API (/mo, 1M chars). Features: 120+ languages, real-time translation, beautiful UI with flag emojis, demo interface showing English→Spanish. Full BlackRoad design. Ready for GitHub + Cloudflare deployment!
